message:
feat(e2e): comprehensive corruption injection framework (bd-2e3s)

7 CorruptionPattern variants (BitFlip, PageZero, RandomOverwrite,
PagePartialCorrupt, HeaderZero, WalFrameCorrupt, SidecarCorrupt),
CorruptionInjector with golden/ safety check, deterministic seeded RNG,
CorruptionReport with SHA-256 originals. Legacy API preserved.
17 tests covering all patterns + edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
